name: RetroAPI
description: Block, Item, Recipe, Entity, Dimension Registration API for Legacy Minecraft. Supports Ornithe and Babric. Optionally Works with StationAPI.

custom.//: Interface injection: consumers see Block/Item already implementing the RetroAPI access interfaces, so `block.strength(...)` / `item.tool(...)` work WITHOUT casting to (RetroBlockAccess)/(RetroItemAccess). The mixins supply the implementations at runtime; this only teaches the compiler. Keys are calamus-gen2 intermediary names (class_17=Block, class_124=Item), matching how StationAPI declares its own injected interfaces at this version.
